headline: Voya Financial Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues & Premiums Rise Y/Y
summary: VOYA tops Q1 estimates with 13% EPS growth, as strong Employee Benefits and Investment Management gains offset higher costs.

headline: Citigroup Upgrades Arthur J. Gallagher to Buy, Lowers Price Target to $250
summary: Citigroup  analyst Matthew Heimermann   upgrades Arthur J. Gallagher (NYSE:AJG) from Neutral to Buy and lowers the price target from $280 to $250.
